infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: DeadDrop needs your location to find nearby notes and verify you're physically present to unlock them.
infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysAndWhenInUseUsageDescrip: Optional background location for proximity alerts.
infoPlist.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: DeadDrop uses your microphone to record voice notes.

plugins.locationAlwaysAndWhenInUsePermission: Allow DeadDrop to use your location to find nearby notes.
